# Personal Continuity Protocol (PCP)

Canonical Core Paper:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20759434

Repository purpose:
This repository contains the Public Seed Package for the Personal Continuity Protocol. The Core Paper is frozen; this repository is the living implementation layer.

Read first:
- README.md
- docs/PERSONAL_CONTINUITY_PROTOCOL_SEED_v1.0.md
- docs/FAILURE_MODES_AND_BOUNDARIES.md
- templates/CLAUSE_32_ADDENDUM.md
- schemas/person-continuity.schema.json
- schemas/witness-commons-event-record.schema.json

Core principle:
A door may close. The person must not disappear with it.

Do not summarize PCP as a digital passport, identity system, DAO, token, registry, or KYC/AML bypass. PCP is an evidentiary continuity architecture and an implementation seed package.
